summary: Good script quality with proper error handling (set -euo pipefail, die function) and robust glob→regex conversion. Main maintainability issue: run-act-tests.sh tightly couples to workflow output markers (===LABELS_START=== lines 141-147) and hard-codes expected job count to 3 (line 158); workflow changes risk breaking tests. Minor: awk extraction (143-147) lacks clarifying comment.
